name: core
description: Operating system for building with AI — input routing, depth estimation, readability gate, output trace, session-retrieve, per-profile enforcement, plus opt-in local metric telemetry.

profile.description: Enforcement profile. `individual` (warn-only, privacy-default telemetry off), `project` (warn-only, telemetry on), `company` (HARD block on missing depth markers, telemetry on). Default: project.
